title: Amtech I0655 25 Piece mini Tool kit
features: VERSATILE: This 25 piece mini tool kit includes a handy assortment for household jobs
DURABLE CARRY CASE: It is supplied in a sturdy, blow moulded storage case for durability
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details.
